critical_honesty_note: The agent CANNOT access Facebook. All 30 groups have url_confirmed=false and rules_checked=false. All recommended_action values are verify_manually. The likely_action field is a group-type-based assessment that guides the operator but does NOT replace reading actual group rules. Every group requires ~30 seconds of operator verification inside Facebook before any posting decision.
assessment_method: Group type analysis based on Serbian Facebook community norms: small niche seasonal groups typically allow relevant job posts; large general groups typically prohibit promotion; expat/community groups require soft helpful wording.
evidence_sources: Euronews Serbia (June 2026) — confirms raspberry picker FB groups are active
Alo.rs (June 2026) — confirms Srem region has active seasonal job groups
General knowledge of Serbian Facebook group norms
